name: Broccoli with Assorted Flavors
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the broccoli into long stalks and florets, removing any tough skin.
2. In a large pot of vigorously boiling salted water, blanch the broccoli for 4 minutes.
3. Drain the broccoli immediately and plunge it into ice water to refresh.
4. In a wok, heat oil until smoking point.
5. Add the broccoli and stir-fry garlic and ginger for 2 minutes until aromatic.
6. Add the remaining ingredients (soy sauce, fish sauce, vinegar, chicken stock, sugar, MSG) and toss to mix well.
7. Remove from heat. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the broccoli to a bowl.
8. To the liquid in the wok, add sesame oil. Adjust seasoning to taste; you may not need much salt.
9. Pour the liquid over the broccoli and marinate for at least 3 hours before serving.
10. Serve at room temperature.
Yield: 4 servings
